item.title: Eyeliner Placement for a Lasting Look
item.description: Learn why placement matters for eyeliner. Keep it close to the lash line and avoid the inner corner for a look that stays put.

media:content.media:title: Eyeliner Placement for a Lasting Look
media:content.media:description: Learn why placement matters for eyeliner. Keep it close to the lash line and avoid the inner corner for a look that stays put.

item.description: A tiny switch that makes the whole eye look instantly more put together. This quick eye makeup tutorial is perfect for a polished fall look.
